demo.warning: This is a demo for Open Cycle Tracker. Data is wiped regularly and not kept. Don’t enter anything real or sensitive.

recover.title: Recover account
recover.resetDone: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.

unlock.title: Locked
unlock.signedInAs: Signed in as <1>{{name}}</1>. Enter your password to unlock.

recovery.warning: Write these 24 words down and keep them somewhere safe and offline. They are the <1>only</1> way to recover your data if you forget your password. We cannot recover them for you.
recovery.acknowledge: I have written down my recovery phrase.

onboarding.intro: This anchors your first cycle and seeds your next-period estimate. You can change it later.
onboarding.setupFailed: Could not finish setup. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings

health.title: Health
health.empty: Nothing here yet. Health settings such as birth control will live here.

data.title: Backup & restore
data.intro: Export your data so you keep a copy even if this server goes away, and restore it into this or another account.
data.exportIntro: Choose how to protect the file.
data.formatEncryptedHint: Unlocked with your recovery phrase. Safe to store anywhere - it survives a lost password and a lost server.
data.plaintextWarning: <0>Unprotected.</0> Anyone who gets this file can read all your data. Only use it for portability, and delete it once you're done.
data.exportError: Could not create the export. Please try again.
data.importIntro: Restores into this account, adding any days not already present (existing dates are left untouched).
data.phraseHint: This encrypted backup is unlocked with the recovery phrase of the account that created it.
data.badFile: That doesn't look like an Open Cycle Tracker backup.
data.unsupportedSchema: This backup was made by a newer version and can't be read here.
data.badPhrase: Couldn't unlock this backup - check the recovery phrase.
data.importError: Could not import the backup. Please try again.
data.resultUnresolved_one: {{count}} entry couldn't be matched and was dropped
data.resultUnresolved_other: {{count}} entries couldn't be matched and were dropped

settings.displayNameHint: Shown in the app. Stored encrypted - the server never sees it.

sessionLock.title: Session lock
sessionLock.intro: When the vault locks it wipes the key from memory, so your password is needed to reopen it.
sessionLock.lockOnHidden: Lock when I switch away from this tab
sessionLock.lockOnHiddenHint: Most secure, but means re-entering your password whenever you glance at another tab.

markers.title: Cycle markers
markers.intro: Choose which phases to highlight on the cycle circle and calendar. This only changes what's shown - your logged data is never hidden or deleted.
markers.menstruationHint: Colors logged period days and the predicted next period. Hides the highlight only - your logged days stay tappable.
markers.pmsHint: Only shown once your cycle is regular enough to predict it.

settings.dangerHint: Deleting your account permanently destroys all your encrypted data. This cannot be undone - and because the server cannot read your data, it cannot be recovered.

duress.title: Decoy & duress
duress.intro: Optional extra passwords for situations where someone may force you to open the app. Both must be <1>different</1> from your main password.
duress.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
duress.decoyDesc: Opens a separate, empty vault. Log in with this password whenever you like to add ordinary-looking entries so it appears used; hand it over under pressure. Your real data stays hidden and cannot be opened with it.
duress.decoySet: Decoy password set. Log in with it any time to fill the decoy vault.
duress.decoyRemoved: Decoy password removed and decoy vault deleted.
duress.destructDesc: <0>Irreversible.</0> Entering this password at the login screen permanently destroys your account and all data - it then shows the same error as a wrong password. There is no recovery. Make sure you have an export elsewhere before relying on it.

cycle.loadError: Could not load your cycle. Please try again.
cycle.setupIntro: Tell us when your last period started and your typical cycle length. This anchors your first cycle and seeds your next-period estimate.
cycle.setupFailed: Could not set up your cycle. Please try again.
cycle.noDays: No days recorded for this cycle.

cycleSetup.onsetLabel: When did your last period start?
